name: Sherry
bio:
Sage of Azure Dreams who lives in seclusion in the Royal Court. An accident in the capital Dulumu once made him the Royal Apothecary.

Role: Heal Debuff
Specialty: A mid-backline Support-type hero that can apply [Curse] to amplify damage; its Ultimate can heal and strengthen allies; its survival increases allies' Normal Attack damage.

skillSlots.name: Succubus Arrow
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies for 80% M.DMG with 70% probability to apply [Bleed].

skillSlots.name: Heartbeat Offering
skillSlots.description: Restores HP equal to 200% ATK and applies [Crit I] to 3 allies with lowest HP Ratio.

effects.name: Peach-Tinted Inspiration
effects.description: While Sherry Survives, increases all allies' Basic Attack DMG by 20%.

effects.name: Peach-Tinted Inspiration
effects.description: [Hex] will detonate immediately when DMG reaches cap during duration, then disappears.

effects.name: Peach-Tinted Inspiration
effects.description: When [Hex] is detonated, deals additional 10% of target's Max HP as DMG and applies 1 stack of [Bleed] (cannot exceed 200% of Caster's ATK).
